title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Office Parks REIT - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Embassy Office Parks REIT - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Are you a skilled Sales Manager looking for your next big career move? Embassy Office Parks REIT in Bengaluru offers you the perfect platform to grow professionally and personally.

About Embassy Office Parks REIT:
Embassy Office Parks REIT is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Achieve monthly and quarterly sales targets
• Negotiate pricing, terms, and conditions on behalf of clients
• Coordinate with legal teams for documentation and title verification
• Manage relationships with existing customers post-purchase
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct site visits and property presentations for clients

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Investment Analysis
• Proficiency in Real Estate Law
• Proficiency in Title Search
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Project Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in Contract Management

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Flexible working hours
• Life and accident insurance
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Bengaluru, Karnataka, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Embassy Office Parks REIT!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Bachelor's degree in a relevant field
